blocks.text: Ruud's Madrid Challenge Begins as the Clay Season Ignites

Monday kicks off with Casper Ruud's strongest hunting ground: Madrid clay. The Mutua Madrid Open — a Masters 1000 where Ruud has repeatedly gone deep — starts at 06:00. This is the Norwegian's best shot at a major title before Roland-Garros.
🎾 Mutua Madrid Open 2026 begins — Casper Ruud enters his favourite clay stage | 06:00
⚽ West Ham at Crystal Palace — Selhurst Park hosts a nervy relegation battle, both sides desperate for points | 21:00
